about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: For over a century, Groppi has been synonymous with excellence and luxury. Our commitment to quality and tradition has made us a trusted name in the industry.
about.missionText: To deliver exceptional products and services that exceed expectations and create lasting memories.
about.visionText: To be the global leader in luxury and premium quality experiences.
about.valuesText: Excellence, Integrity, Innovation, and Customer Satisfaction.
